title: capsicum spina-alba
intro: Capsicum spina-alba, also known as white pepper cayenne, is a variety of hot pepper plant that belongs to the Capsicum annuum species. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Capsicum spina-alba include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the management of certain types of cancer. Capsicum spina-alba can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for herbal use, and it is often used to add flavor and heat to various dishes.
